'''Tellanroaeg''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] astronomical object. It was located on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]] in the [[Gaulus sector/Legends|Gaulus sector]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Tellanroaeg became the site of a [[Battle of Tellanroaeg|battle]] between the forces of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|contingency order]] issued to the [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone commanders]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], reached Tellanroaeg.

==Description==
Tellanroaeg was an astronomical object<ref name="ROTS">[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]]</ref> located in the [[Tellanroaeg system/Legends|Tellanroaeg system]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Gaulus sector/Legends|Gaulus sector]]<ref name="Gaulus" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]] linked it to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
During the first campaigns of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Tellanroaeg lay within the sphere of influence of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. By that [[Time/Legends|time]], the [[Fourteenth Army|Fourteenth Sector Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was charged with engaging the [[Confederacy military/Legends|military forces]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in Tellanroaeg's vicinity.<ref name="TEGTW" />

[[File:TellanroaegOuterRimSieges.png|thumb|left|200px|Tellanroaeg was the site of a battle during the Clone Wars' Outer Rim Sieges.]]
The area Tellanroaeg was located in was still under the control of the Hutts by [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], by which time the Confederacy fortified the celestial body as one of its holdings during the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]] phase of the Clone Wars. The Republic laid [[Battle of Tellanroaeg|siege to Tellanroaeg]] around that time, with the site experiencing major combat.<ref name="TEA" />

In 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="NEC date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the issuance of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> the Republic [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] issued [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]],<ref name="ROTS" /> a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|contingency order]] instructing the [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone commanders]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] to [[Death/Legends|execute]] their [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Commanding officer/Legends|superior officers]].<ref name="True Colors">''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]''</ref> The order was received by [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Commander/Legends|commanders]] on various battlefronts across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], including Tellanroaeg.<ref name="ROTS" /> By [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], Tellanroaeg was situated within the borders of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] controlled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TEGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tellanroaeg was first mentioned in the [[2005]] [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|novelization]] of the [[Prequel trilogy|film]] [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], which was written by [[Matthew Stover]].<ref name="ROTS" />

The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''<ref name="TEA" /> and the [[2012]] reference book ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''<ref name="TEGTW" /> place the [[Tellanroaeg system/Legends|Tellanroaeg system]], and therefore the celestial body Tellanroaeg, on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]] within grid square S-17. That territory corresponds to a section of the [[Gaulus sector/Legends|Gaulus sector]], according to [https://www.starwars.com/news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors]. However, the [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] instead places the Tellanroaeg [[Star system/Legends|system]] in the [[Hunnoverrs sector/Legends|Hunnoverrs sector]], which this article assumes to be erroneous.<ref name="Gaulus" />
